description.p: BudsLink provides comprehensive battery monitoring and feature control for supported Bluetooth wearable audio devices, including popular models from Apple, Beats, and Sony. The application communicates directly with supported devices to expose battery levels, noise control modes, and advanced interaction features when available, offering a consistent and configurable interface across different vendors.
This application is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Apple, Sony, Samsung, or Nothing.

ul.li: Monitor earbud and charging case battery levels
Control Active Noise Cancellation and ambient sound modes
Support conversation awareness on compatible devices
Automatic volume reduction during conversation awareness
Media pause and resume using in-ear detection
Device-specific configuration for gestures and controls
Customizable device icons and appearance settings
Optional overrides for system dark mode and accent colors

screenshot.caption: Extension and widget integrations, installed separately

ul.li: Add D-Bus service API for external device control and monitoring
Introduce GVC-based audio controller, replacing pactl subprocess usage
Add support for Samsung Galaxy Buds devices
Enable packet logging toggle for debugging and diagnostics
Add integration links for GNOME Extension, Plasma Widget, and Cinnamon Spices with D-Bus based control and monitoring in service mode
UI improvements and bug fixes across device control and settings panels
Improved UI on mobile and small-screen devices
